---
title: "The AI &amp; Machine Learning Encyclopedia"
description: "A comprehensive, plain-English reference for the whole field of artificial intelligence and machine learning — every major topic explained as an intuition-first explainer plus simple question-and-answer drills."
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

A complete, plain-English reference for the **entire field of AI and machine learning** — from the mathematics underneath it, through classical ML, deep learning, reinforcement learning, and the language/vision/multimodal frontier, to classical symbolic AI, applied systems, and the production, ethics, and research directions shaping what comes next. **47 chapters across 9 parts.**

Every chapter is a clear, **intuition-first explainer** — flowing guide-style prose that builds each idea step by step, with a diagram, formula, snippet of code, or small visual wherever it makes the concept click. (If you want interview-style question-and-answer drills instead, see the [Interview Handbook](interview-guide.html).)

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
**How to use this:** each chapter is its own fast-loading page. Read one top to bottom to learn the subfield, then follow the *See also* links to related chapters. Every page has *prev / next* links and a *jump-to-any-chapter* menu at the top.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# 🗺️ The map of AI &amp; ML — 47 chapters {#map}

**🌐 Foundations** — *what AI is, the math, the process, and the data*

- [**01.** 🌐 The Landscape of AI](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch01.html)
- [**02.** 🧮 Mathematics for Machine Learning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch02.html)
- [**03.** 🔄 The Machine Learning Process](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch03.html)
- [**04.** 🧹 Data Preprocessing & Feature Engineering](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch04.html)

**🧩 Classical Machine Learning** — *the pre-deep-learning algorithms and how to evaluate them*

- [**05.** 📈 Linear & Logistic Models](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch05.html)
- [**06.** 📍 Instance-Based & Probabilistic Classifiers](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch06.html)
- [**07.** 🛡️ Support Vector Machines & Kernels](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch07.html)
- [**08.** 🌳 Decision Trees & Ensemble Learning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch08.html)
- [**09.** 🔮 Clustering & Unsupervised Learning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch09.html)
- [**10.** 🗜️ Dimensionality Reduction & Manifold Learning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch10.html)
- [**11.** 🎯 Model Evaluation, Validation & Selection](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch11.html)

**🎲 Probabilistic & Statistical ML** — *reasoning with uncertainty and graphical models*

- [**12.** 🎲 Bayesian Machine Learning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch12.html)
- [**13.** 🕸️ Probabilistic Graphical Models](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch13.html)

**🧠 Deep Learning** — *neural networks from perceptrons to diffusion and graphs*

- [**14.** 🧠 Neural Network Fundamentals](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch14.html)
- [**15.** ⚙️ Training Deep Neural Networks](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch15.html)
- [**16.** 🖼️ Convolutional Neural Networks](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch16.html)
- [**17.** 🔁 Recurrent & Sequence Models](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch17.html)
- [**18.** ⚡ Attention & Transformers](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch18.html)
- [**19.** 🪞 Autoencoders & Self-Supervised Learning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch19.html)
- [**20.** 🎨 Generative Models: GANs, VAEs & Flows](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch20.html)
- [**21.** 🌫️ Diffusion Models](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch21.html)
- [**22.** 🔗 Graph Neural Networks](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch22.html)

**🕹️ Reinforcement Learning** — *learning to act from reward*

- [**23.** 🕹️ Reinforcement Learning Foundations](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch23.html)
- [**24.** 🎰 Model-Free Reinforcement Learning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch24.html)
- [**25.** 🤖 Deep Reinforcement Learning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch25.html)
- [**26.** ♟️ Multi-Agent RL & Game Theory](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch26.html)

**🗣️ Language, Vision & Modalities** — *CV, NLP, speech, LLMs, RAG, agents, and multimodal AI*

- [**27.** 👁️ Computer Vision](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch27.html)
- [**28.** 💬 Natural Language Processing](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch28.html)
- [**29.** 🔊 Speech & Audio Processing](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch29.html)
- [**30.** 📚 Large Language Models](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch30.html)
- [**31.** 🎚️ Prompting, Fine-Tuning & Alignment](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch31.html)
- [**32.** 🔎 Retrieval-Augmented Generation & Vector Search](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch32.html)
- [**33.** 🦾 AI Agents & Tool Use](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch33.html)
- [**34.** 🌈 Multimodal AI](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch34.html)

**🛠️ Applied ML Systems** — *recommenders, forecasting, and anomaly detection*

- [**35.** 🛒 Recommender Systems](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch35.html)
- [**36.** ⏳ Time Series Analysis & Forecasting](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch36.html)
- [**37.** 🚨 Anomaly Detection](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch37.html)

**📚 Classical & Symbolic AI** — *search, logic, planning, games, and evolutionary methods*

- [**38.** 🧭 Search & Problem Solving](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch38.html)
- [**39.** 📖 Knowledge Representation & Reasoning](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch39.html)
- [**40.** 🗺️ Planning, Constraint Satisfaction & Game Playing](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch40.html)
- [**41.** 🧬 Evolutionary Computation & Metaheuristics](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch41.html)

**🚀 Production, Responsibility & Frontier** — *MLOps, infra, interpretability, causality, ethics, and what is next*

- [**42.** 🔧 MLOps & LLMOps](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch42.html)
- [**43.** 🚀 AI Infrastructure & Efficient Inference](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch43.html)
- [**44.** 🔍 Explainable AI & Interpretability](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch44.html)
- [**45.** 🧷 Causal Inference & Causal ML](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch45.html)
- [**46.** ⚖️ AI Ethics, Fairness, Safety & Governance](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch46.html)
- [**47.** 🌠 Frontier & Emerging Directions](ai-ml-encyclopedia/ch47.html)
